title: verbena lindleyana
intro: Verbena lindleyana, also known as Lindley's verbena, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family, native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbena lindleyana include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and calm respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Verbena lindleyana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
